untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'Dealer ask price' — dealer-specific microstructure data not available in standard OHLCV indicators; (2) 'Estimated fundamental value' — requires external valuation model not in indicator set; (3) 'Available size for purchase' — order book depth data not in allowed indicators; (4) 'Bid-ask spread' — requires tick-level data; (5) 'Spread z-score above 20-bar mean' — cannot compute without explicit bid-ask spread indicator. Only volume ratio and bandwidth approximations were attempted.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy mapping: close discount → discount_threshold_pct applied as decimal multiplier (0.99 = 1% below). Volume surge → vol_ratio_20 comparison. Widened spread → bb_bandwidth as volatility proxy. However, core signal logic depends on dealer quotes, fundamental value estimation, and order book microstructure data unavailable in standard OHLCV indicators. This signal is fundamentally untranslatable without market microstructure data feeds.
